candidates.why: Likely short-term bank borrowings/current borrowings when listed in current liabilities section; exclude lease debt.
Explicit current portion of debt and useful as fallback/prior-year label, but could overlap with current credit institutions if both are used together.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Lease maturities explicitly excluded from STD baseline.
Too broad; may include non-debt items and cannot be cleanly identified as short-term debt.

variables.notes: R:c. STD appears under different labels across years. 'Credit institutions' in the current liabilities block is the best current-balance label; 'Debt Maturing Within One Year' is included as a fallback/prior-year label. Do not sum both within the same year if both are populated, to avoid overlap. Lease-related rows were excluded.
